title: tinnea coerulea var. coerulea
intro: Tinnea coerulea var. coerulea, also known as Blue Snakeroot, is a perennial plant species in the mint family that is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Blue Snakeroot include reducing inflammation and promoting the healing of wounds, as well as providing relief from colds and flu due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Blue Snakeroot can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support respiratory health and soothe sore throats.
